channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CRANEX] Cranex Ltd Receives Major Orders for Supply of Various Products Worth Rs. 5,88,32,115/-
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cranex Ltd has announced that it has received Purchase Orders from its customers for manufacturing and supply of various products with an order value of approximately Rs. 5,88,32,115/-. The orders include two nos. of 32/10T Doubte EOT Crane from Ordnanace Factory Medak, East Central Rly DDU, nine nos. of 5T x 7.3 Mtr Span Single Gnder EOT Crane from HYT Engineer Company Pvt Ltd-Jodhpur, Northern Rly Lucknow, and one EOT Crane 20T Double Girder with sapn 28.85mtr from Godawari Power & Ispat Ltd. The products will be delivered within the agreed timeline, and the orders include standard terms related to quality, delivery schedule, and pricing as mutually agreed by both parties.

  • Cranex Ltd receives orders worth Rs. 5,88,32,115/-
  • Two nos. of 32/10T Doubte EOT Crane from Ordnanace Factory Medak
  • Nine nos. of 5T x 7.3 Mtr Span Single Gnder EOT Crane from HYT Engineer Company Pvt Ltd-Jodhpur, Northern Rly Lucknow
  • One EOT Crane 20T Double Girder with sapn 28.85mtr from Godawari Power & Ispat Ltd
  • Products to be delivered within the agreed timeline

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CRANEX LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [SCBL] Saptak Chem And Business Ltd: Independent Director Chirag Nanavati Resigns Due to Pre-Occupation
item.description:
Saptak Chem And Business Ltd announced the resignation of Independent Director Chirag Nanavati from his positions as Independent Director, Chairman of the Audit Committee, Stakeholder Relationship Committee, and Member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, effective March 13, 2026. The resignation is due to Nanavati's pre-occupation in other activities. Nanavati confirmed there are no other material reasons for his resignation. The company will file Form DIR-12 with the Registrar of Companies to inform of the resignation.

  • Resignation of Independent Director Chirag Nanavati from Saptak Chem And Business Ltd.
  • Nanavati's resignation is due to pre-occupation in other activities.
  • Nanavati has confirmed there are no other material reasons for his resignation.
  • Saptak Chem And Business Ltd will file Form DIR-12 with the Registrar of Companies to inform of the resignation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saptak Chem And Business Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [REGAL] Regal Entertainment Receives In-Principle Approval for Rights Issue of up to 850 Lakhs from BSE
item.description:
Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd has received an in-principle approval from BSE Limited for a rights issue of shares amounting to 850 Lakhs under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The approval letter was received on March 16, 2026. The company is required to comply with all legal and statutory formalities before finalizing its offer documents. The Exchange has granted in-principle approval for listing of fully paid-up equity shares proposed to be issued on a rights basis, subject to the company's completing post-issue requirements and complying with necessary statutory, legal & listing formalities.

  • Regal Entertainment has received in-principle approval from BSE for a rights issue of up to 850 Lakhs.
  • The approval is under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company is required to comply with all legal and statutory formalities before finalizing its offer documents.
  • The Exchange has granted in-principle approval for listing of fully paid-up equity shares proposed to be issued on a rights basis.
  • The approval is subject to the company's completing post-issue requirements and complying with necessary statutory, legal & listing formalities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [CRANEX] Cranex Ltd Secures Historic Order for 220/80 Ton Double Girder Electric Overhead Travelling Crane
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cranex Ltd has received a prestigious order for the manufacture and supply of a 220/80 Ton Double Girder Electric Overhead Travelling (EOT) Crane, marking a historic milestone in its 53-year history. This order, the first of its kind for the company, demonstrates the strong confidence of customers in Cranex's engineering excellence, manufacturing capabilities, and technological expertise in the heavy-duty crane segment. This achievement strengthens the company's position in the high-capacity industrial crane market and contributes positively to its growth trajectory and long-term value creation.

  • Cranex Ltd secures a historic order for a 220/80 Ton Double Girder EOT Crane.
  • This is the first time in the company's 53-year history that it has secured an order for such a high lifting capacity crane.
  • The order reflects the strong confidence of customers in Cranex's engineering excellence, manufacturing capabilities, and technological expertise.
  • This achievement strengthens Cranex's position in the high-capacity industrial crane market.
  • The management believes this development will contribute positively to the company's growth trajectory and long-term value creation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CRANEX LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [VALUEIND] 59th Meeting of Value Industries Ltd's Committee of Creditors Scheduled for March 18, 2026
item.description:
Value Industries Ltd, a company under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process by NCLT order since 2018, has announced a pre-facto intimation of the upcoming 59th meeting of the consolidated Committee of Creditors (CoC). The meeting, scheduled for March 18, 2026, is in accordance with the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (Insolvency Resolution Process for Corporate Persons) Regulations, 2016. The CoC includes 12 Videocon group companies under a consolidated Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process.

  • Value Industries Ltd is under a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process since 2018.
  • A pre-facto intimation has been issued for the 59th meeting of the Committee of Creditors.
  • The meeting is scheduled for March 18, 2026.
  • The Committee of Creditors includes 12 Videocon group companies under a consolidated Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process.
  • The announcement is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Value Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LUPIN] Lupin and Zydus Partner for Co-marketing Innovative Semaglutide Injection in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Global pharma major Lupin Limited has entered into a Licensing and Supply Agreement with Zydus Lifesciences Limited to expand access to innovative Semaglutide Injection (15 mg/3 ml) with a patient-friendly reusable pen device in India. This partnership aims to strengthen patient access for advanced diabetes and weight management therapies. Under this agreement, Lupin will have semi-exclusive rights to co-market Zydus’ innovative Semaglutide Injection in India under the brand names Semanext” and Lupin’s Livarise®. Zydus will continue to market the product under the brand names SEMAGLYN™, MASHEMA™ and ALTERME™. The agreement includes upfront licensing fees and milestone payments on achieving pre-defined milestones.

  • Lupin and Zydus have entered into a Licensing and Supply Agreement for co-marketing innovative Semaglutide Injection in India.
  • The partnership aims to strengthen patient access for advanced diabetes and weight management therapies.
  • Lupin will market the product under the brand names Semanext” and Lupin’s Livarise®.
  • Zydus will continue to market the product under the brand names SEMAGLYN™, MASHEMA™ and ALTERME™.
  • The agreement includes upfront licensing fees and milestone payments on achieving pre-defined milestones.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUPIN LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [ICDSLTD] ICDS Ltd: No Undisclosed Material Information Behind Significant Price Movement
item.description:
ICDS Ltd has reviewed its operations and other developments, stating that there is no undisclosed material information or event concerning the company which may have a bearing on the price/volume behavior of the company’s shares. The movement in the share price is attributed to general market conditions, investor sentiment, or other external factors. The company remains committed to complying with SEBI regulations and making timely disclosures of any material events or information as required.

  • ICDS Ltd states no undisclosed material information affecting share price
  • Share price movement attributed to general market conditions, investor sentiment, or external factors
  • Company remains committed to SEBI LODR Regulations compliance
  • Timely disclosures of material events or information to continue as per Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICDS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus and Lupin Partner for Co-marketing Innovative Semaglutide Injection in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences Ltd and Lupin Limited have entered into a Licensing and Supply Agreement to co-market an innovative Semaglutide Injection in India. This partnership aims to strengthen patient access for advanced diabetes and weight management therapies. Zydus will market the product under the brand names SEMAGLYN™, MASHEMA™ and ALTERME™, while Lupin will market it as Semanext® and Lupin’s Livarise®. Lupin will pay Zydus upfront licensing fees and milestone payments.

  • Zydus and Lupin sign licensing agreement for co-marketing innovative Semaglutide Injection in India.
  • Zydus will market the product under the brand names SEMAGLYN™, MASHEMA™ and ALTERME™.
  • Lupin will market the product under the brand names Semanext® and Lupin’s Livarise®.
  • Lupin will pay Zydus upfront licensing fees and milestone payments.
  • Partnership aims to strengthen patient access for advanced diabetes and weight management therapies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [DARJEELING] Darjeeling Industries Receives Trading Approval for 30,12,010 Equity Shares Issuance
item.description:
Darjeeling Industries Ltd (formerly Darjeeling Ropeway Company Limited) has received trading approval from BSE Limited for the issuance of 30,12,010 fully paid-up equity shares. These shares are to be issued to non-promoters on a preferential basis pursuant to the conversion of warrants. The approval comes in reference to the company's in-principle application made on October 25, 2024. The shares, with distinctive numbers from 4850001 to 7862010, will be listed on the Exchange effective from March 17, 2026.

  • Darjeeling Industries receives trading approval for 30,12,010 equity shares
  • Shares to be issued to non-promoters on a preferential basis
  • Issuance pursuant to the conversion of warrants
  • Approval received from BSE Limited
  • Listing to be effective from March 17, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Darjeeling Ropeway Company Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [WEWORK] WeWork India Management Ltd to Add Capacity in Bengaluru by 2,327 Desks
item.description:
🔥 Trending

WeWork India Management Ltd, formerly known as WeWork India Management Private Limited, has entered into a Lease Deed for capacity addition in Bengaluru, admeasuring 1,51,201 square feet. This will result in an increase in its operational capacity by approximately 2,327 desks. The existing capacity is 1,21,638 desks with a utilization of 83.90%. The proposed capacity is to be added tentatively on or before June, 2026. The investment required is approximately INR 32 Crore, which will be financed through internal accruals or debt. The rationale behind this capacity addition is to cater to incremental demand and to enhance the Company’s operational capacity in line with business growth.

  • WeWork India Management Ltd to add capacity in Bengaluru by 2,327 desks
  • The existing capacity is 1,21,638 desks with a utilization of 83.90%
  • The proposed capacity is to be added tentatively on or before June, 2026
  • The investment required is approximately INR 32 Crore
  • The capacity addition is to cater to incremental demand and to enhance the Company’s operational capacity

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WeWork India Management Ltd | Category: Expansion
